case_title: JOSE ROBERTO BATRES VS. T&H JANITORIAL SERVICES, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BATRES, JOSE ROBERTO AS TO DEFENDANT T&H JANITORIAL SERVICES, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BATRES, JOSE ROBERTO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT T&H JANITORIAL SERVICES, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY $4,241.15 PRINCIPAL, $24.06 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,490.21, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
